programmes.show_description: Find a range of year round practical home solutions from homewares and cleaning to electronics and DIY home improvement tools. This show will bring you the products you need to enhance your home.
Snap up a bargain from this selection of silver and gold jewellery, set with the world's finest simulated diamonds - all for under £30 (including VAT and P&P)!
The perfect blend of cosmetics and skincare, the bareMinerals range is ideal for women who are concerned about the additives, preservatives and fragrances routinely found in make-up.
The perfect blend of cosmetics and skincare, the bareMinerals range is ideal for women who are concerned about the additives, preservatives and fragrances routinely found in make-up.

Tune in to see Shark's homecare solutions, featuring innovative technology designed to make your cleaning routine easier.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Find a range of year round practical home solutions from homewares and cleaning to electronics and DIY home improvement tools. This show will bring you the products you need to enhance your home.
Grow your own with Suttons. Discover seeds, plants, and expert tips to start your gardening journey and enjoy fresh, homegrown produce all season long.
Make your gardening equipment a reason to be cheerful with this fantastic range of high-quality, practical tools, stylish bird-feeders and much more besides from Grumpy Gardeners.
Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Refresh your garden with our Spring Gardening Solutions! Tune in and be the first to discover essential tools and tips to transform your outdoor space into a vibrant oasis.
Join us for an hour of fantastic DIY and gardening items at great value prices - perfect for all projects big and small.
Treat yourself to a wardrobe refresh with the Most Wanted Spring Fashion. Tune in and discover gorgeous colours, quality fabrics, top-notch advice, and so much more!
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Tune in to see Shark's homecare solutions, featuring innovative technology designed to make your cleaning routine easier.
Refresh your garden with our Spring Gardening Solutions! Tune in and be the first to discover essential tools and tips to transform your outdoor space into a vibrant oasis.
Tune in and transform your space! Discover top cleaning and storage brands to prepare for spring tidying with essential tips to make your home shine.

Want to know what's hot in the world of electronics? Tune in and explore the latest innovations in TVs, computers, tablets, cameras and more from the leading brands you know and trust.
Create a warm and cosy sanctuary in your home, with the Cozee Home range of snuggly bedding, throws and accessories offering comfort and coziness in your home.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!
